**What was done:**

**Infrastructure changes (system-level):**
- `/etc/default/prometheus-node-exporter` — set `ARGS="--collector.textfile.directory=/var/lib/node_exporter/textfile_collector"` to enable the textfile collector
- `/var/lib/node_exporter/textfile_collector/` — created and made world-writable so the user-service exporter can write `.prom` files
- `prometheus-node-exporter` restarted with textfile collector active
